slides.title: Constructor – __construct()
Constructor Example
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
class User {
    public $name;
    public $email;
    public function __construct($name, $email) {
        $this->name = $name;
        $this->email = $email;
    }
    public function introduce() {
        return "Hi, I'm $this->name, my email is $this->email";
    }
}
$user = new User('Alice', 'alice@example.com');
echo $user->introduce();
?>

slides.title: Destructor – __destruct()

quizData.question: When is the constructor method called?

options.text: When the object is created with new

quizData.explanation: The constructor is automatically invoked upon object instantiation.
